events.name: XferJobQueued
events.trigger: XferJob row inserted (status=queued). Fires from XferJobObserver.created.
consumers: activity::HasActivityLog observer on XferJob → activity_log row
audit::HasAudit observer on XferJob → audits row

events.name: XferJobStarted
events.trigger: XferJob transitioned from queued → running. Fires from AbstractDynamicImport/Export BeforeImport / BeforeExport handler.

events.name: XferJobProgress
events.trigger: Fires every `config('transfer.progress_every_rows')` rows during a chunk, or on every shard completion. NOT audit-worthy — broadcast only.

payload.counters: { total, created, updated, skipped, failed, deleted }

events.name: XferJobShardCompleted
events.trigger: One XferShard transitioned to succeeded or failed. Fires from XferShardObserver.updated. Coordinator job aggregates counters into the parent XferJob.
consumers: ImportCoordinatorJob / ExportCoordinatorJob — aggregates + updates parent progress

events.name: XferJobCompleted
events.trigger: XferJob transitioned to succeeded (zero failed rows). Fires from MarkXferJobCompletedJob.
consumers: any downstream module listening for its own entity's completion (e.g. newsletter subscribes on kind=import + entity=subscribers)

events.name: XferJobPartiallySucceeded
events.trigger: XferJob transitioned to partially_succeeded (some rows failed but the run continued per stopOnError=false). Fires from MarkXferJobCompletedJob.
consumers: SendXferJobNotificationJob (chained; sends XferJobPartiallySucceededNotification with errors artifact link)

events.name: XferJobFailed
events.trigger: XferJob transitioned to failed (unrecoverable). Fires from AbstractDynamicImport/Export::failed(Throwable) handler.

events.name: XferJobCancelled
events.trigger: XferJob transitioned to cancelled either by user request (POST /jobs/{id}/cancel) or stale sweep (queued/running with no progress > 24h). Fires from XferJobObserver.updating.

events.name: XferArtifactPruned
events.trigger: XferArtifact file deleted from disk by PruneXferArtifactsJob. Row survives; path nulled + purged_at set.

events.name: SampleDataGenerated
events.trigger: GenerateSampleDataJob completed — fixture records inserted for a #[SampleData]-annotated entity.
